text.title: Project Integration Management Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Weekly status from numeric inputs
example.note: schedule SPI=0.93 → AMBER (threshold 0.9-0.95); cost CPI=1.02 → GREEN; risk count delta +2 → YELLOW. PM annotates rationale per dimension; colour not overridden. Status pack dispatched to sponsor + PMO.
